meta.principle: The scroll is the initiation. Ice at the top, ember at the bottom. Restraint is what makes the fire mean something.

glacier.role: page surface, top of site (ice register)

fog.role: secondary text on glacier, hairlines on light

basalt.role: page surface, bottom of site (ember register)

ash.role: secondary text on basalt, hairlines on dark

ember.role: the only warm accent in the system. Target usage: ~3% of total rendered surface area, site-wide. Never used as a large fill — cursor glow, single words, one CTA outline, ember dots.

usage_rules: Ember is a scarcity accent, not a brand color to fill with. If a component wants ember as a background fill larger than a button or a dot, stop and reconsider.
Never place text-on-glacier-* colors on a basalt surface or vice versa. TemperatureController governs which set is active.
Hairlines are always the -on-glacier or -on-basalt token matched to the current surface, never a hardcoded gray.

border.rule: The only border/outline width in the system. Used for the Hairline divider, EmberCTA's outline and focus ring, and any other 1px rule line. One source of truth so a future 'make hairlines finer' decision is one edit.

usage.component_internal: 8, 13, 21 — padding inside cards, gaps between icon and label
usage.component_rhythm: 34, 55, 89 — gaps between related elements within a section
usage.section_rhythm: 144, 233, 377 — vertical spacing between distinct page sections

spacing.rule: All spacing must be one of these nine values. No arbitrary px/rem values anywhere in the codebase.

layout.rule: Two-region layouts split at 61.8/38.2, not 50/50. Alternate which side is major per section to create a spiraling reading path down the page.

marginRegistrationLine.position: 38.2% gutter from left, full page height
marginRegistrationLine.concept: abstracted from basalt columnar jointing — see art-direction.md

role_assignment.voice: headlines, poetry/quote moments, the Inquiry's reflection output, visitor-typed answers
role_assignment.ui: navigation, labels, body copy, buttons, module numbers
role_assignment.mono: section index numbers (01–12), timestamps, technical labels

typography.rule: Two weights only, regular and medium. Never bold (700). Sentence case everywhere, no title case, no all-caps except single-word section labels at label/caption size with letter-spacing.

easing.name: expo-out
easing.rule: This is the only easing curve used anywhere on the site. No spring, no bounce, no elastic, no second curve.

scroll.feel: viscous, geological — never bouncy or elastic

entrance.text: rise 21px + fade, duration base, stagger 89ms between lines/words
entrance.image: scale 1.06 to 1.0 inside clip-path mask, bottom-up reveal, duration slow
entrance.hairline: scaleX 0 to 1 from left origin, duration base

reducedMotion.rule: All entrance/parallax/cursor effects collapse to simple opacity fade, duration fast. TemperatureController becomes discrete per-section values instead of continuous scroll interpolation.

componentContracts.note: Add prop shapes here before stubbing a component in a parallel lane, per AGENTS.md §4.

TemperatureController.behavior: provides the scroll-driven glacier-to-basalt interpolation as a CSS custom property to descendants
